example: The new system is sophisticated but easy to use.
meaning: adj.复杂的；精密的；老练的；见多识广的；高雅的

example: She polished her essay before handing it in.
meaning: v.擦亮；磨光；润色；改进；n.光泽；波兰语

example: He sharpened his pencils before class.
meaning: v.使锋利；削尖；提高；使更清晰

example: Please ensure that all windows are closed.
meaning: v.确保；保证

example: That is an apt description of the situation.
meaning: adj.恰当的；贴切的；易于……的；有……倾向的

example: The mechanic pieced the broken machine together.
meaning: n.一块；一件；一篇；v.拼装；拼凑

example: We had to resort to using candles during the power cut.
meaning: n.度假胜地；常去的地方；v.求助于；诉诸；采取（常与to连用）

example: I still marvel at how quickly children learn languages.
meaning: n.奇迹；令人惊奇的人或事；v.感到惊奇；对……惊叹

example: The weather here is highly variable in spring.
meaning: n.变量；adj.多变的；可变的；不稳定的

example: The museum has a collection of imperial treasures.
meaning: adj.帝国的；皇帝的；威严的；英制的

example: Her diligence helped her finish the project on time.
meaning: n.勤奋；用功；尽职；刻苦

example: He is a conscientious worker who never cuts corners.
meaning: adj.认真的；负责的；尽责的；一丝不苟的

example: Technology inevitably changes the way we live.
meaning: adv.不可避免地；必然地

example: The novel gives a vivid depiction of city life.
meaning: n.描写；刻画；描述；再现

example: There was a red marking on the map.
meaning: n.标记；记号；痕迹；评分；分数

example: The film was met with critical acclaim.
meaning: n.称赞；喝彩；赞许；v.称赞；为……喝彩

example: She made a resolution to read more this year.
meaning: n.决心；决定；解决；决议；分辨率

example: He wants to work in aviation after graduation.
meaning: n.航空；航空业；飞行

example: The company will undertake the repair work next week.
meaning: v.承担；着手做；负责；同意做

example: She has expertise in digital marketing.
meaning: n.专业知识；专长；专门技能
